/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/aether.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/aether.dir/aether_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/aether.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/aether.dir/src/database.cpp.o CMakeFiles/aether.dir/src/scanner.cpp.o CMakeFiles/aether.dir/src/player.cpp.o CMakeFiles/aether.dir/src/mpris.cpp.o CMakeFiles/aether.dir/aether_qmltyperegistrations.cpp.o CMakeFiles/aether.dir/build/.qt/rcc/qrc_qmake_Aether.cpp.o CMakeFiles/aether.dir/build/.rcc/qmlcache/aether_qmlcache_loader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/aether.dir/build/.rcc/qmlcache/aether_qml/Main_qml.cpp.o CMakeFiles/aether.dir/build/.rcc/qmlcache/aether_qml/Sidebar_qml.cpp.o CMakeFiles/aether.dir/build/.rcc/qmlcache/aether_qml/PlayerBar_qml.cpp.o CMakeFiles/aether.dir/build/.rcc/qmlcache/aether_qml/AlbumGrid_qml.cpp.o CMakeFiles/aether.dir/build/.rcc/qmlcache/aether_qml/ArtistList_qml.cpp.o CMakeFiles/aether.dir/build/.rcc/qmlcache/aether_qml/GenreGrid_qml.cpp.o CMakeFiles/aether.dir/build/.rcc/qmlcache/aether_qml/CollectionGrid_qml.cpp.o CMakeFiles/aether.dir/build/.rcc/qmlcache/aether_qml/AlbumModal_qml.cpp.o CMakeFiles/aether.dir/build/.qt/rcc/qrc_aether_raw_qml_0.cpp.o -o aether  /usr/lib/libQt6QuickControls2.so.6.11.1 /usr/lib/libQt6Multimedia.so.6.11.1 /usr/lib/libQt6Quick.so.6.11.1 /usr/lib/libQt6OpenGL.so.6.11.1 /usr/lib/libQt6Qml.so.6.11.1 /usr/lib/libQt6Gui.so.6.11.1 /usr/lib/libGLX.so /usr/lib/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/libQt6DBus.so.6.11.1 /usr/lib/libQt6Network.so.6.11.1 /usr/lib/libQt6Core.so.6.11.1 /usr/lib/libtag.so /usr/lib/libz.so
